database.reason: Relational model with 7 entities, FK constraints, recursive CTEs for cascade engine. Supabase Storage for photos/documents.

deploy.reason: Hobby tier — preview deployments not available. Deploy with --prod flag.

auth.notes: First time using Supabase Auth in this setup. Expect escalations during foundation. Pattern available in catalogue (supabase-auth-nextjs.yaml).

framework.name: next.js
framework.reason: Server components for data loading, client interactivity for Gantt/cascade. PWA support.

storage.reason: Bundled with Supabase, no additional service needed.

notifications.reason: Browser Web Push via PWA. No email integration. Service worker handles push notifications.

incompatibilities_resolved.issue: Vercel hobby tier does not support preview deployments
incompatibilities_resolved.resolution: Deploy directly to production with --prod flag

risk_flags.description: Supabase + Vercel combo has not been tested in this Rouge setup before. Expect foundation escalations for auth middleware, RLS configuration, and storage integration.
risk_flags.mitigation: Foundation phase should validate auth flow and basic CRUD before proceeding to milestone stories.

risk_flags.description: Supabase Auth has not been used in prior Rouge builds.
risk_flags.mitigation: Use catalogue pattern (supabase-auth-nextjs.yaml) as starting point. Validate session handling in middleware early.
